title: Policy List Access Control Scoping
description: The list_policies endpoint (api/v1/policies.py) returns all policies system-wide without access control scoping. Any authenticated agent can list all policies, including those created by agents in other trust hierarchies. Filter to policies created by the caller or their ancestors, consistent with the authorization evaluation scoping in AuthorizationService._load_policies.
validation: list_policies only returns policies created by the caller or their ancestors
Agents cannot see policies from unrelated trust hierarchies
Tests verify scoping with multi-agent scenarios
Tests verify root agent can see all policies
